subcodes.first_line: O my God, O my God! This leaf hath vibrated from the breezes wafted from the gardens of Thy Lordship, and this handmaiden hath shone forth [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الهی الهی هذه ورقه قد اهتزت من نفحات نفحت من ریاض ربوبیتک و هذه امه استشرقت
subcodes.subjects: @consolation and comfort, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @eulogies; reminiscences, @prayer for the departed, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness
